About Me

14 years of marketing mastery,
now AI-amplified.

I'm a seasoned marketing strategist who has operated at every level of the marketing function — from hands-on account management to C-suite leadership. My career spans national FMCG media buying across 10+ Indian states, building and scaling a 20-member advertising agency team, and driving 25–40% measurable growth for multiple brands.

Today, I combine this deep domain experience with cutting-edge AI tools — making me one of India's rare marketing professionals who can deliver both traditional brand-building depth and modern AI-powered execution. I write on Medium and Quora, actively share marketing insights, and am currently completing a Data Analytics program with the AI Career Accelerator.
